headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 22, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros suffered a tough loss to the Cleveland Guardians, who took the game 5-8. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance. The Cincinnati Reds dominated the Tampa Bay Rays, securing a 12-6 victory. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Dustin May earning the win after 5.1 innings of work.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. San Francisco Giants catcher Daniel Susac has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026. The Houston Astros have also placed Taylor Trammell on the 10-day injured list with a left groin strain. Other notable injuries include Sonny Gray's right hamstring strain, Raisel Iglesias' right shoulder inflammation, Edwin Díaz's right elbow loose bodies, Miles Mastrobuoni's right calf strain, and Brendan Donovan's left groin muscle strain.

The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees. In exchange, the Astros traded right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez to the Yankees. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded right-handed pitcher Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded right-handed pitcher Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Guardians in 5-8 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a tough loss to the Cleveland Guardians, who took the game 5-8. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Reds Rout Rays 12-6**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds dominated the Tampa Bay Rays, securing a 12-6 victory. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Marlins 5-3**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Dustin May earning the win after 5.1 innings of work. Nathan Church led the Cardinals' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Brewers Blast Past Tigers 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers dominated the Detroit Tigers, securing a 12-4 victory. Brice Turang led the Brewers' offense with 2 hits, 4 RBIs, and 5 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Giants Place C Daniel Susac on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants catcher Daniel Susac has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees. In exchange, the Astros traded right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez to the Yankees.
